item.title: 显示 HN：可定制的 SAP MCP 服务器
item.summary: Hi, I'm Stefan, cofounder of superglue. People use superglue to connect their agents to all kinds of legacy systems. Now, we have released our own prebuilt mcp server for SAP and will launch other systems over the next few days. What makes this different from the 100 other SAP MCP servers? Mainly that you can use our a
